mapper.select: SELECT * FROM auth_user WHERE username = #{username} AND deleted = 0 LIMIT 1
SELECT org_name FROM sys_organization WHERE id = #{orgId} AND deleted = 0 LIMIT 1
mapper.update: UPDATE sys_employee SET email = #{email}, phone = #{phone}, gender = #{gender}, avatar_url = #{avatarUrl}, updated_by = #{updatedBy}, updated_at = NOW() WHERE user_id = #{userId} AND deleted = 0
